title: Verify An AGB Floor Location Using Node Code Or Cell Code
summary: Use the node code or cell code for an AGB location to verify the physical floor location by matching it to the physical number on the floor QR code, then confirm or communicate that location.
when_to_use: Use when you need to verify where an AGB is physically located on the floor, or when you need to direct another person to that location using the node code or cell code that matches the floor QR code number.
not_for: Not for moving, restarting, or otherwise controlling an AGB.
Not for determining system navigation steps or software workflows not provided in this source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Obtain the node code or cell code reference, compare it to the physical floor QR code number, and verify or communicate the AGB location.

safety_notes: This source describes a location verification reference process only.
Do not assume any control action, movement action, or system change from this procedure unless supported by another approved source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the AGB location reference containing the node code or cell code
Physical access or visual access to the floor QR code marker

access_required: Access to the source-provided location reference containing the node code or cell code
Ability to view the physical floor QR code marker
system_preconditions: A node code or cell code is available for the AGB location being checked

visual_references.description: Training video frame aligned to transcript explaining that node code or cell code matches the physical floor QR code number used to verify AGB location.

steps.title: Obtain the node code or cell code
steps.purpose: Get the location reference value that will be matched to the physical floor marker.
steps.instruction: Obtain the node code or cell code for the AGB location from the available location reference.
steps.expected_result: A node code or cell code is available for comparison.
steps.healthy_condition: The node code or cell code is clearly identified and available to the user.
steps.failure_condition: The node code or cell code is unavailable, unclear, or cannot be confirmed from the available reference.

actions.label: Get location code
actions.exact_action: Obtain the node code or cell code for the AGB location from the source-provided location reference.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Transcript-aligned explanation that node code or cell code is the location reference used to match the floor marking.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the node code or cell code cannot be obtained from the available reference.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The node code for a cell code matches what is on the floor; the floor QR code has a physical number that can be used to verify where the AGB is.

steps.title: Find the floor QR code marking
steps.purpose: Locate the physical floor marker that contains the number used for location verification.
steps.instruction: Go to the floor location and find the QR code marking with its physical number.
steps.expected_result: The floor QR code marker and its physical number are visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The floor QR code is present and its physical number can be read.
steps.failure_condition: The floor QR code cannot be found, cannot be read, or does not show a usable physical number.

actions.label: Locate floor QR code
actions.exact_action: Go to the floor location and find the QR code marking with its physical number.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Evidence that the floor QR code has a physical number on it and is used as the physical location marker.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the floor QR code marker cannot be located.
Stop or escalate if the physical number on the floor QR code cannot be read.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If you look at the floor, that QR code has a physical number on it.

steps.title: Compare the code to the floor number
steps.purpose: Determine whether the reference code matches the physical floor location marker.
steps.instruction: Compare the node code or cell code to the physical number on the floor QR code.
steps.expected_result: You determine whether the node code or cell code matches the floor QR code number.
steps.healthy_condition: The node code or cell code matches the physical number on the floor QR code.
steps.failure_condition: The node code or cell code does not match the physical number on the floor QR code.

actions.label: Match code to floor marker
actions.exact_action: Compare the node code or cell code to the physical number on the floor QR code.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The relationship between node code or cell code and the physical floor QR code number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the floor QR code number does not match the provided node code or cell code.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The node code for a cell code matches what is on the floor; the floor QR code has a physical number that can be used to verify where the AGB is.

steps.title: Verify or communicate the AGB location
steps.purpose: Use the matched code to confirm the AGB location or direct another person to it.
steps.instruction: Verify that the AGB is at the matching location, or communicate that location to another person using the matched code.
steps.expected_result: The AGB location is confirmed or clearly communicated using the matched node code or cell code and floor QR code number.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGB is found at the verified location, or the verified location can be communicated clearly to another person.
steps.failure_condition: The AGB is not found at the verified location, or the location cannot be confirmed after matching the code.

actions.label: Verify AGB location
actions.exact_action: Verify that the AGB is at the matching location.

actions.label: Communicate verified location
actions.exact_action: Communicate that location to another person using the matched code.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Transcript-aligned evidence that the matched code can be used to verify where the AGB is or direct someone to that location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the AGB is not found at the verified location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The node code for a cell code matches what is on the floor; the floor QR code has a physical number that can be used to verify where the AGB is.

success_criteria: The node code or cell code is matched to the physical number on the floor QR code.
The AGB floor location is confirmed, or the verified location is communicated to another person.
healthy_conditions: A node code or cell code is available from the location reference.
The floor QR code marker is present and readable.
The node code or cell code matches the physical floor QR code number.
The AGB is found at the verified location or the location can be communicated clearly.
failure_conditions: The node code or cell code cannot be obtained.
The floor QR code marker cannot be found or read.
The floor QR code number does not match the provided node code or cell code.
The AGB is not found at the verified location.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the floor QR code number does not match the provided node code or cell code.
Escalate if the AGB is not found at the verified location.
Escalate if the floor QR code marker cannot be located or read.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training frame aligned to transcript describing node code or cell code matching the physical floor QR code number.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The node code for a cell code matches what is on the floor; the floor QR code has a physical number that can be used to verify where the AGB is.
If you look at the floor, that QR code has a physical number on it.

missing_details: The source does not specify where the node code or cell code is retrieved from within a system interface.
The source does not provide a detailed escalation path or named escalation role.
The source does not provide timing estimates.
The source does not provide additional visual detail of the floor QR code beyond stating that it has a physical number.
The attached artifact frame is primarily a different slide; its relevance is based on aligned transcript evidence rather than a dedicated floor QR code image.
